final:
module decoder_4_to_16 (  
    input [3:0] in,  
    output reg [15:0] out  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        out = 16'b0000000000000000; // Reset all outputs  
        out[in] = 1'b1; // Set the output corresponding to the input  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out[7:0] <= ~in[3:0];
      out[15:8] <= in[3:0];
    end
  end

endmodule
